**Which**

<!-- False positive (flagged code that is fine) or false negative (missed a real bug). -->

**Rule id and location**

**The code**

negative, why it is a real defect. -->

**Run context**

<!-- Roughly how the repo was scanned, and anything that helps reproduce. -->
